THANKSGIVING DAY 2025 ❤️U FATHER
Heavenly Father, I want to let you know that you are truly loved. and I want to let you know thank you Lord for everything you have done and still are doing in my life bringing me closer to you, you are in control you are the center of my life and I will always need you my Lord and almighty savior Jesus christ thank you again my father. Happy Thanksgiving to you in Jesus mighty name; AMEN 🙏🏻 ❤️🦃 #GOD #jesuschrist #heaven #bible #blessings #prayers #prayerlife #lordandsavior #church #gospel #h
